title: Assorted Clear Glass Bottles with Corks, 6 Pack, 2.5in X 9in, 16oz
description:
About this item
QUALITY BUILD. Made with premium glass and shaped by hand, each glass bottle has a unique design, and the superior glass allows heavy resistance to long term use to ensure you can use your bottle for a long time. The bottles are lead free and exceptionally durable and hard to break during using, even outdoors. The no slip design keeps the bottle in your hand.
MULTI-USE. The mid-sized 2.5in(6.3cm) x 9in(22.9cm) bottle holds 16oz. The size allows you to use the bottle for anything from kitchen uses, such as olive oil, to decoration. They can be used as small bud vases, wedding favors, medicine jars, liquor, and more. The bottle is also great for art or DIY projects such as sand art, bottle messages, or many others.
ANTIQUE STYLE. The high-quality glass is shaped to mimic the look of classic antique bottles. It makes a great addition to your spice cabinet, bar, or as decoration around the house. Restaurant owners love these bottles and have opted to use these bottles instead of shot glasses for the extremely authentic aesthetic that remind us of simpler times.
SAFE FROM US TO YOU. Packed with protective box layering inside, as well as being packed with top and bottom layers of package lab tested glass protective foam. Dishwasher safe and shock resistant.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Well made bottles, great for salad dressing or oil. Just look greatAll came in perfect condition. Very pretty!One was broken upon receiving, but not the main one I wanted so it didn't bother me. They are well packaged. Nice glass bottles, great for sand art, or any type of artful display. The stopper isn't very stable, I recommend glue.Good quality, packed well, and beautiful bottles.These are about the size of an olive oil bottle. They are really pretty in my bathroom holding our mouthwash and fluoride rinse. These are so versatile and can be used in so many different ways. The corks were nice and springy - not dry and crumbly. Would recommend these happily.I bought these bottles for decorative purposes. They were packed beautifully and arrived in one piece. They were the right size I needed. They’re great for dressings and oils. Love the styles all 6!!We used these for center pieces, painted them a glossy white and mog podged them and they came out great.These a great bottles for decorating and craftsThe bottles are nice and I like the corks. Shipping in general has been a big issue with purchases here but this seller sent via secure shipping which is always appreciated!I Cannot find large pretty water bottles unless very expensive. So now I just keep cold water in each of these and when setting the table, I give everyone their own water bottle next to the water glass and they dress up the table beautifully.
reviews_1s: The bottles came and were beautiful! I bought them for a Bottle Tree for outside. They did not say they were UV protected, but I bought them thinking that they would last for at least a couple of years. They came and looked just like they represented in the ad, put them outside on my bottle tree. 2 and 1/2 Weeks Later they're almost completely clear glass, no longer any resemblance of any lavender. So if you buy these for an outside bottle tree, don't do it they will not last. For inside use only!I bought these because they looked pretty for my family gifts and they said 16 oz for our home grown freshly pressed olive oil. Well they are not 16 ounces, they hold barely 12 oz. Too late now to return them for something else but this is wrong of the seller to give the wrong size. Very disappointed. Plus they look kind of cheap in person with the noticeable seams, not high quality would not recommend.If you are looking to put a liquid in these, then I would say pass on them. 3 of 6 leaked which is ridiculous in my opinion. I do not recommend these at all.They have been on my bottle tree for about a month, they are now clear instead of purple.Honestly, I’m disappointed I thought they were beautiful. I needed them as Christmas gifts. They came the day before Christmas Eve so I couldn’t even return them. I just feel bad because if I had the time I would’ve returned them and got some thing else they were cheap looking, damage, chipped, cracked, scratched. Very disappointed!!!I ordered this product to use for messages in a bottle for a pirate theme for a girls camp. When I went to put them together half were broken and half were either missing the cork or the cork was so low in the bottle I could not get it out.I loved my beautiful purple bottles but they completely lost their color in less than a month!I ordered these lovely looking bottles to make a gift for friends this Christmas. I opened up the package and the first two bottles look like they have been used. One has a gross film on the inside and the other has spots of something crusty. This is disgusting.Only received 3 bottles even though I purchased 6. Now the item is unavailable! What a rip off. Also theyre all exactly the same. I wasn’t expecting all six to be different, but c’mon! Only 3?! All of them identical?! This blows.Bottles were broken 😠
